title: Approximate join reorder generate suboptimal join tree
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE table9(key0 INTEGER primary key, col0 VARCHAR(255), col1 FLOAT, col2 BOOLEAN, col3 DATE);
INSERT INTO table9 VALUES (1, 'test', 1.1, TRUE, DATE '2023-01-01'), (2, 'example', 2.2, FALSE, DATE '2023-01-02');
CREATE TABLE table10(key0 INTEGER primary key, col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER, col2 INTEGER, col3 INTEGER);
SELECT * FROM table9 JOIN table10 ON table9.key0 = table10.key0;
key_bug_features: Approximate join reorder adds cross product without connections
